message:
perf(indexer): batched lexical rebuild with memory guardrails, switch to local frankensqlite path deps

Two main improvements:

**Batched message fetching with guardrails (indexer/mod.rs, storage/sqlite.rs):**
Replace the prior per-conversation message fetch loop with a smarter
batched fetch (default: 16 conversations per batch) via
fetch_messages_for_lexical_rebuild_batch accepting max_messages and
max_content_bytes limits. If a batch exceeds either guardrail, the
query aborts with a descriptive error and the caller falls back to the
old per-conversation path. Three new env vars control batch sizing:
CASS_TANTIVY_REBUILD_BATCH_FETCH_CONVERSATIONS,
CASS_TANTIVY_REBUILD_BATCH_FETCH_MESSAGES,
CASS_TANTIVY_REBUILD_BATCH_FETCH_MESSAGE_BYTES.
normalize_lexical_messages helper closure extracted to avoid duplication
in both fetch paths. Two new unit tests: content-byte guardrail
verification and batch SQL sort-temp B-tree avoidance.

**Local frankensqlite path deps (Cargo.toml, Cargo.lock):**
Uncomment [patch] block switching from published crates to local path
overrides for all fsqlite-* crates (20 crates). Lockfile updated
accordingly — no new third-party dependencies.

**Minor cleanups:**
- SemanticManifest: all Default::default()+field-set patterns replaced
  with struct literal style (semantic_manifest.rs, search_asset_harness.rs)
- assert_eq!(x, false) → assert!(!x) (asset_state.rs)
- match guard refactor (e2e_jsonl_schema_test.rs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
